title: Thinking About Buying Bonds? Check Out This Stock Instead

title: The Bottom Is In For Garmin Stock
text: If Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) has anything to its credit, and it has quite a lot, it has diversification. This technology powerhouse makes and markets a wide range of gadgets and components used by governments, businesses and individuals in use cases that span all verticals.

title: 2 Surprising Stocks Bucked Wednesday's Market Drop
text: Find out why upward momentum might be on shareholders' side for at least one of these companies.

title: Garmin Q4 results: ‘they're leader in fitness and marine lifestyle'
text: Shares of Garmin Ltd (NASDAQ: GRMN) are up more than 5.0% on Wednesday after the technology company reported better-than-expected results for its fiscal fourth quarter. Garmin's outlook for the full year For 2023, the Kansas-based company now forecasts $5.0 billion in revenue – about a 3.0% annualised growth, as per the earnings press release.

title: Garmin's (GRMN) Q4 Earnings & Sales Beat Estimates, Down Y/Y
text: Garmin's (GRMN) fourth-quarter sales results benefit from strong growth in the aviation segment despite weakness in the fitness and auto businesses.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Garmin (GRMN) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 18.42% and 1.03%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - January 2023 Update
text: The 4 factor dividend growth portfolio was launched on November 1st, 2022, and is thus far off to a great start. The portfolio lost by 11 bps to the S&P 500 Total Return during the month of January.

title: 3 Tech Stocks Suited Nicely for Income Investors
text: With technology stocks staging a rebound in 2023, those with an appetite for income may be seeking exposure to the sector. These 3 stocks provide precisely that, all currently boasting annual dividend yields above 2%.

title: Garmin smartwatches reach new heights with Polaris Dawn space mission
text: Crew members will wear Garmin fēnix 7 adventure watches to help scientists understand how space travel affects the human body OLATHE, Kan. , Feb. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin smartwatches will play an important role in an upcoming Polaris Dawn human spaceflight, with highly accurate health data gleaned from fēnix ® 7 adventure watches providing 24/7 insights into the impact of space travel on the human body.

title: Get a perfect look around the clock with vívomove Trend from Garmin
text: Stylish hybrid smartwatch blends a classic analog design with  essential health, fitness and smart features OLATHE, Kan. , Feb. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced vívomove® Trend , a hybrid smartwatch with a classic analog design plus essential smart features such as smartphone notifications and Garmin Pay ™ contactless payments.
